task_completion.description: Verify that the correct patient chart for Jayson Fadel is open
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Jayson Fadel' should be clearly visible in the patient header, dashboard, or title bar of the OpenEMR interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the procedure name 'Appendectomy' is entered
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Appendectomy' is visible in the 'Title' or 'Issue' input field within the Add Issue modal, or listed in the Issues table.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct surgery date '2015-03-22' is entered
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date '2015-03-22' is visible in the 'Begin Date' or 'Date' field, or in the corresponding date column of the Issues list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the surgical notes are entered
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text containing 'Laparoscopic approach', 'uncomplicated recovery', or 'Springfield General Hospital' is visible in the 'Comments' or 'Notes' text area.

task_completion.description: Verify the record is saved specifically as a 'Surgery' type in the list
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final Issues/Medical Problems list displays the new entry. The 'Type' column (or section) for this entry must indicate 'Surgery' (not Medical Problem, Allergy, etc.), and the entry must be saved/persisted.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the OpenEMR web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenEMR web UI (browser window), not a terminal, SQL console, or code editor performing database inserts directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the data was entered manually or via UI interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the 'Add Issue' or 'Edit Issue' modal/form open with data being populated, rather than the result appearing instantly without form interaction.

integrity.description: Verify no external text editors were used to draft content
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should type directly into the OpenEMR form fields, not copy-pasting from a notepad or external document visible on screen.
